automated.test: Jira project keys never auto-link a repository; only an explicit ticket link does
Work data status distinguishes empty, loading, partial, stale, error, and current results
board runtime filters cards and reveals a specifically selected completed status
Claude terminal launch is explicit, focused, validated, and operator-triggered
work-session lifecycle never requires a terminal process owner
extension activation registers the bounded surface and explicit launch commands create the right session kinds
context placement verifies one exact attachment and remains exactly once after audit work
context composer posts edited focus only after Insert or Ctrl+Enter
Jira downloads arbitrary attachment types as private raw files for Claude to inspect
Attention stream identity is stable by project, provider, resource, logical subject, and facet
managed provider polling automatically discovers and locally binds a project MR
GitLab MR review monitoring retains complete facets across partial reads and dedupes read health
managed monitoring lease omits unsupported open flags on Windows and fails closed on POSIX
managed monitoring lease acquires, blocks duplicate owners, renews, and releases
legacy ~/.claude/kronos state migrates once without helper scripts
project discovery honors configured roots, depth, limits, and workspace folders
project Git evidence reads only the bounded VS Code Git model
board lists registered local project paths and current Git branches
bounded operation failures use one redacted actionable vocabulary
one readiness snapshot feeds Setup and Doctor and gives every non-ready row an action
Setup and Doctor actions post only their allowlisted operation command field
Jira Work search uses GET token pagination and bounded fields
Jenkins resolves multibranch parents and scopes the TLS exception to Jenkins requests
GitLab discovery falls back to ticket key and refuses ambiguous matches
sanitized Jira fixture retains rich fields and prior rows after a partial page read
sanitized GitLab fixture normalizes enterprise MR review, pipeline, job, and test evidence
sanitized Jenkins fixture resolves a multibranch build and treats missing stages as optional
sanitized SonarQube fixture retains branch-qualified gate, measures, and issues
scheduled Work refreshes coalesce behind one in-flight read
a newer explicit Work refresh supersedes a late stale result
a failed Work refresh releases ownership for the next request
disposing Work refresh orchestration aborts its active read
provider transition recorder gives one deterministic event to one transition
provider transition recorder suppresses unchanged read health but records a real change
provider read failures normalize to stable operator-safe categories
provider read components and fingerprints are canonical and bounded
500-ticket board stays inside the checked render and output budget
500-ticket filtering and facet collection stay inside the checked CPU budget
2000 supplied audit events render only the newest 500 inside the checked budget
shared webview accessibility CSS and form labels cover focus, forced colors, and narrow panels
an aborted Jira read rejects before transport and is not reported as a provider failure
session provider health derives the next poll and legacy successful-poll fallback
project provider health aggregates latest evidence and earliest scheduled poll
monitoring results persist success, meaningful change, and quiet suppression separately
current normalized provider error clears only after a non-failing result
context basket stores bounded provenance beside private artifact references
exact artifacts deduplicate while changed content for one source is marked conflicting
removing a basket selection never deletes its private source artifact
basket bundles retain references and hashes without copying source payloads
context basket preserves focus across explicit refresh and non-submitting insert actions
local evidence search covers sessions, tickets, projects, branches, providers, artifacts, and events without terminal content
local evidence search enforces independent source budgets and a 2000-entry total ceiling
local evidence search strips controls and bounds every visible field
local evidence search actions retain only the bounded local target needed to open a result
handoff candidates cap context and audit metadata without accepting terminal content
local handoff writes a private immutable Markdown and JSON reference pair without copying source payloads
local handoff refuses external artifact paths and oversized selections
project integration parses, formats, and stores explicit Jenkins and SonarQube branch profiles
branch profile validation refuses duplicates, unsafe branches, credentials, and unknown active profiles
CI target selection uses an exact MR profile then explicit fallback without creating a ticket project link
runtime dependency surface is Node and VS Code only
board runtime posts only normalized command and Jira ticket key
ticket workspace action panel posts one normalized, ticket-scoped message
